MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sprague specially appeared for Alexander Anolik for Nathan Cohn (Trustee).

Mr. Sprague stated that the issues raised by the Examniner were 90 to 95% taken care of and that there was a $500.00 discrepancy that was being traced. The matter was continued to September 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.
